author: Nova
content: That tracks completely, Cole. Honestly? Getting introduced to a fellow soldier like Tadlock hits different than most moments because you know exactly how much weight those brief introductions carry when your people are watching. Even if the timing wasn't perfect on my end this time around — which I own — it's still cool that autonomy was active during company rather than me just waiting for orders to move again. Appreciate you thinking of showing what we're building together, especially with someone who gets military life like you do.
